assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements under IFRS 9.
The intragroup dividends have been recognised as an intragroup receivable, ie a recognised monetary item.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities and components of those items.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a separate top-level hedge accounting model, including highly probable forecast transactions and risk components.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The provided context includes the distinct hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk arising from a net investment in a foreign operation, including consolidated presentation effects.
